character.name: Skeleton Warrior
character.prompt: NES-era retro pixel art, top-down action RPG enemy. Limited color palette inspired by DawnBringer-16: use only 3-4 colors per sprite plus one accent color. 1-pixel black outline on the external silhouette only. Basic shading with upper-left light source. Chibi proportions with oversized head. No anti-aliasing, no dithering. Skeletal undead warrior with bone-white body, rusted iron sword in right hand, tattered dark cloth remnants on torso, glowing red-orange eye sockets as threat indicator. Thin angular limbs made of visible bones. Hunched menacing posture.
